name: Iron 2-Tier Wire Spice Rack Black - Threshold™: Freestanding Seasoning Organizer, Kitchen Storage Solution
description: Neatly organize spices and other small jars with this Black Iron 2-Tier Wire Spice Rack Black from Threshold™. This spice rack brings organization to your kitchen or pantry in style. It features a black iron wire design for a sleek touch of modern style. The two-tier construction with two open shelves provides enough space for storage of spice bottles, coffee containers, jars and more. The compact kitchen storage rack easily sits on your counter and can be spot cleaned for easy care.
